name: 06 — LinkedIn Lead Generation (Standalone · Daily Auto + Manual)

nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 9 PM IST (Mon-Fri)
nodes.notes: Runs Mon-Fri at 15:30 UTC = 9:00 PM IST. Posts from the past 48h are scanned for leads.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Click 'Execute workflow' in n8n to run immediately on demand.

nodes.name: Supabase: Fetch Recent Published Posts
nodes.notes:
Fetches posts published in the last 48h. linkedin_post_id must be saved by workflow 02.
If you store the URN under a different column name, update the select param.

body.text: LinkedIn Lead Scan: No published posts found in the last 48 hours. Publish a post first via workflow 02.

nodes.name: Process Each Post
nodes.notes: Outer loop: one LinkedIn post at a time

nodes.name: Has LinkedIn Post URN?
nodes.notes: Skip posts where we don't have the LinkedIn URN stored

nodes.name: Skip: No URN Stored
nodes.notes: If post_urn is missing, ensure workflow 02 saves linkedin_post_id to content_queue after publishing

nodes.name: Process Each Person
nodes.notes: Inner loop: one person at a time

nodes.name: Apollo: Enrich Prospect
nodes.notes: Free tier: 50 enrichments/month. Gets email, company size, industry, tech stack.

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $input.first().json;

const engagementNote = p.engagement_type === 'comment'
  ? 'Commented: ' + (p.comment_text || '(no text)')
  : 'Liked the post about ' + p.post_topic;

const prompt = [
  'Score this LinkedIn prospect for SNG Advisors (Indian CA firm offering offshore accounting teams to AU/UK/US CPA firms).',
  '',
  'Name: ' + p.name,
  'Headline: ' + p.headline,
  'Job Title: ' + p.job_title,
  'Company: ' + p.company_name,
  'Company Size: ' + (p.company_size ? p.company_size + ' employees' : 'unknown'),
  'Location: ' + p.country,
  'Industry: ' + p.industry,
  'Tech Keywords: ' + p.tech_keywords,
  'Engagement: ' + engagementNote,
  'Post Topic: ' + p.post_topic,
  '',
  'Scoring (0-100):',
  '+25 if located in Australia, UK, USA, Canada, Singapore, UAE',
  '+25 if CPA / CA / accounting / bookkeeping firm',
  '+20 if title includes CFO, Finance Director, Controller, Partner, Director',
  '+15 if company size 10-100 employees',
  '+15 if comment/headline mentions outsourcing, offshore, Xero, MYOB, QuickBooks, hiring, overwhelmed',
  '+10 if engagement_type is comment',
  '+10 if industry is Accounting or Financial Services',
  '-20 if located in India',
  '-15 if student or intern',
  '-10 if company size over 500',
  '',
  'Reply ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown:',
  '{"score":0,"tier":"HOT or WARM or COLD","qualification_reasons":["r1"],"red_flags":["f1"],"ideal_outreach_angle":"one sentence hook"}'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...p, _score_prompt: prompt } }];

body.system: You are a B2B lead qualification expert. Reply only with valid compact JSON, no markdown.

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $input.first().json;

const engagementNote = p.engagement_type === 'comment'
  ? 'They commented: ' + (p.comment_text || '')
  : 'They liked our post about ' + p.post_topic;

const prompt = [
  'Write a LinkedIn connection request note for Saksham Garg at SNG Advisors.',
  'SNG Advisors helps AU/UK/US CPA firms build offshore accounting teams from India, saving 40-60% on costs.',
  '',
  'Prospect:',
  'First name: ' + p.name.split(' ')[0],
  'Title: ' + p.job_title,
  'Company: ' + p.company_name,
  'Location: ' + p.country,
  'Headline: ' + p.headline,
  'How they engaged: ' + engagementNote,
  'Best outreach angle: ' + p.ideal_outreach_angle,
  '',
  'Rules:',
  '- Max 280 characters (hard LinkedIn limit)',
  '- Reference something specific from their profile or engagement',
  '- Mention their pain point, not our solution',
  '- End with curiosity not a pitch',
  '- No emojis. Professional but warm.',
  '- Do NOT say: book a call, let us connect, I noticed you',
  '',
  'Reply with ONLY the message text. No quotes, no explanation.'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...p, _dm_prompt: prompt } }];

body.system: You write short, specific, non-generic LinkedIn connection request messages. Reply with ONLY the message text, nothing else.

body.text: LinkedIn Lead Scan: Posts found but no prospects scored 60+. Try more targeted post topics: outsourcing pain, hiring accountants, Xero/MYOB migration.

notes:
FULLY STANDALONE — no dependency on any other workflow.

TRIGGERS:
  Auto: Mon-Fri 9 PM IST (scans last 48h of published posts)
  Manual: click Execute in n8n UI anytime

REQUIRED ENV VARS:
  LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN  — LinkedIn OAuth token
  APOLLO_API_KEY         — apollo.io free tier (50 enrichments/month)
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY      — Claude API
  SUPABASE_URL           — Supabase project URL
  SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY   — Supabase service role key
  TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN     — Telegram bot
  TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID       — your Telegram chat ID

ONE-TIME SETUP — run this SQL in Supabase:
  ALTER TABLE content_queue ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS linkedin_post_id text;
  ALTER TABLE content_queue ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS published_at timestamptz;
  ALTER TABLE content_queue ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_post_url text;

  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS leads (
    id                    uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    linkedin_id           text UNIQUE,
    name                  text,
    email                 text,
    job_title             text,
    company_name          text,
    company_size          int,
    country               text,
    industry              text,
    linkedin_url          text,
    headline              text,
    tech_keywords         text,
    score                 int,
    tier                  text,
    qualification_reasons jsonb,
    red_flags             jsonb,
    ideal_outreach_angle  text,
    engagement_type       text,
    comment_text          text,
    source_post_urn       text,
    source_post_url       text,
    dm_draft              text,
    dm_char_count         int,
    status                text DEFAULT 'pending_outreach',
    dm_sent_at            timestamptz,
    replied_at            timestamptz,
    meeting_booked_at     timestamptz,
    notes                 text,
    created_at            timestamptz DEFAULT now()
  );

OPTIONAL — make workflow 02 save the LinkedIn URN after publishing:
  In workflow 02, after the LinkedIn publish node, add a PATCH to:
  /rest/v1/content_queue?id=eq.{post_id}
  Body: { linkedin_post_id: '<urn from LinkedIn response>', published_at: '<now>', source_post_url: '<url>' }
  Without this, the workflow skips posts where URN is missing.

LEAD TIERS:
  HOT  (>=75) — send DM same day
  WARM (60-74) — review and send within 48h
  COLD (<60)  — not saved
